Togo Pushes UN to Ditch Distorted World Map Showing Africa Smaller than its Real Size Foreign Minister Robert Dussey urged UN states to replace the Mercator map with Equal Earth projection that shows Africa smaller that it really is, aiming to reflect Africa’s true size & challenge long-standing distortions shaping global perception. NEW: The U.S. is deploying about 10,000 additional troops and multiple warships to the Middle East to increase pressure on Iran. This includes aircraft carriers and Marine units, adding to roughly 50,000 U.S. personnel already in the region. Officials say the military buildup gives the U.S. more options if talks fail, including possible strikes or even ground operations. Source: WaPo

🇮🇷 ⚡️ Jan Fada, For Iran More than 25.4 million Iranians have registered for the “ Jan Fada, For Iran ” volunteer campaign, a state-backed initiative launched in late March 2026 to signal readiness to defend the country against American-Zionist aggression. “Jan Fada” (meaning “self-sacrifice”) allows citizens to sign up online as a symbolic show of support -- it is not conscription , but a commitment expression of national solidarity promoted through media and SMS. Many Senior officials and heads of institutions have also joined, including President Masoud Pezeshkian and Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf , both declaring their readiness to sacrifice their lives for Iran.

🤣 🇺🇦 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 We would like to help with the unblocking of the Strait of Hormuz, however, so far America has not approached us with such a request - Zelensky "We already have experience of a blockade in the Black Sea, we could help" Americans are constantly in contact with Iran and they don't have time for Ukraine - Zelensky 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

British Finance Minister Rachel Reeves: I feel very frustrated and angry that the U.S. went into this war without a clear exit plan. This is a war that we did not start. It was a war that we did not want. Without a clear idea of what they were trying to achieve. As a result, the Strait of Hormuz is now blocked. Source: The Mirror

Spain approved a plan to grant legal status to about 500,000 undocumented migrants, offering them a one-year renewable residence permit. To qualify, applicants must have lived in Spain for at least five months and have no criminal record. Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez called it an “act of justice” and said the move is needed to support Spain’s ageing economy. Source: BBC

A BBC undercover investigation revealed that staff at a government hospital in Taunsa, Pakistan, reused syringes on children, likely causing a major HIV outbreak. Between November 2024 and October 2025, at least 331 children tested positive for HIV, with more than half the cases linked to contaminated needles.

Türkiye's ROKETSAN shows successful test firings of its KARAOK short-range anti-tank missile in four scenarios, all direct hits. The tests demonstrated fire-and-forget guidance and armor-piercing tandem warhead performance. KARAOK has similar role as systems like US Javelin or Russian Kornet. Max effective range: ~2,500 meters. Effective from very close range (~76 m) to near maximum.
Zelensky: Americans are constantly in contact with Iran and have no time for Ukraine. If the war lasts longer, there will be fewer weapons for Ukraine.
Zelensky: The Strait of Hormuz is blocked, and we want to unblock it. We already have experience from the blockade of the Black Sea. America has not asked us yet. Source: ZDF

Marjorie Taylor Greene: The current center right and left coalition in America has put us $40 trillion in debt. They’ve funded foreign war after foreign war after foreign war, and now they’re funding another one, with no idea how long it will last. It’s gotten to the point where Americans can’t afford life.

Senator Graham: I’m actually okay with the way Trump is talking to a bunch of terrorists. I could care less what words he uses. I want outcomes. Delaying the negotiations or extending the ceasefire — that could be a mistake. We’ll comply with the law of war, but all hell’s about to break loose on this regime. He’s offering them the ability to exist as a nation — not as a state sponsor of terrorism. No moratorium on enrichment. I will not support that. Enrichment has to be none. I don’t trust Iran when it comes to enrichment. The 900 pounds of highly enriched uranium needs to be in our control.

Francesca Albanese describes her life now as completely transformed and unstable, saying it feels like a “rollercoaster.” After speaking out on Gaza, she began receiving death threats, including threats against her children, and had to seek protection. The pressure has extended to her family, with her husband’s career affected and her daughter also caught up in the situation. Sanctions imposed by Trump’s administration have made everyday life difficult—her property was seized, she can’t use credit cards, and often relies on cash or help from friends. Source: The Guardian

Lebanese Minister Ghassan Salamé: I was appalled by seeing Netanyahu parading on Lebanese territory. It’s my territory. It’s not his. They flatten out whole villages. I would advise our neighbors to the south some more humility.

Lebanese Minister Ghassan Salamé: If the Israelis have been unable to produce a complete disarmament of Hamas in Gaza in more than two years… how do you expect a much smaller, much weaker army to do it in Lebanon? The members of that armed group are not foreigners. They are part of the population. You are not fighting against a foreign enemy.
